TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Estonia u Estonia sa i labu nu Oco, itiza i 59 00 N, 26 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 45,228 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 42,388 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 2,840 km2, hamin nu tademawan sa 1,258,545. kakalukan umah sa 22.20%, kilakilangan umah sa 52.10%, zumaay henay umah sa 25.70% Ay-sa-ni-ya a masakaputay kapulung a kanatal (Ay-sa-ni-ya a kamu: Eesti Vabariik), hamin nu pulung Ay-sa-ni-ya (Ay-sa-ni-ya a kamu: Eesti, ('eňźs ≤ti)), u sakacacay nu Pu-lul a bayu nu kanatal, u satabakiay a tusu nu cen-se i Ta-lin . Ay-sa-ni-ya i O-cul nu sawali saamisan. kini lala' nu kanatal namakayda i ta-lu atu i teban nu Pu-lul a bayu 2222 a subal nu masakaput mapulung, paysatip nu Pu-lul a bayu, saamisan u Hung-lan , i sawali mitepal tu Cu-te-hu , nu timulan atu sawalian maliwasak mahida u La-tul-wei-ya atu Er-lul-si u misululay pabeli, u ahebal nu lala' 45,227 pin-haw-kung-li , u demiad nu ta-lu tanengay ku akuti' susuemedan . kina kanatal nu itiniay tu a tademaw u binacadan Ay-sa-ni-ya u nu Pu-lul u Hung-lanay a tademaw. kina kanatal ayda satu nu Pai-o-li-se-huy , O-cul malcabayay mapulung, O-yuan kenis , Sen-ken kenis , saamisan ta-si-yang nikapulungan a kaput , atu nu kalisiw malpadan atu sapalahed a masakapud a tademaw nu kanatal, ya nisakalis u sayadahay ku kalisiw i kitaki. (u kamu nu Hulam: :Eesti Vabariik), :Eesti,('eňźs ≤ti) ), .) tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Tallinn . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 24 bulad 2 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung ÁłĹÁĶĪ) ayza sa ci Alar Karis, micakat a demiad sa i 2016 a mihca 11 bulad 10 demiad. u cunli nu Estonia ayza sa ci Kaja Kallas, micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 1 bulad 26 demiad. laylay Ay-sa-ni-ya a kakitidaan i ayaw nu laylay a tademaw hawsa nu Hung-lan-u-ke-er a tademaw . na i 1227 a mihcaan, Ay-sa-ni-ya alaw malu nu Tan-may atu nu ri-er-man a tademawayay nu Li-wu-ni-ya u mipadangay miadin tu tademaw temeceng, namahini sisa cumuden nu ciwlu . namakayni satu sa, Ay-sa-ni-ya kina pinaay tu makuwan nu Bei-o . nikahida idaw ku Tan-may , Nul-wiy , Rye-tiyan a kanatal, Pu-lan-li-taw-wan malkaputay . 18 . 18 a se-ci maalaw nu Er-lul-si-sa nu hungtiay a kanatal u Er-kul cacayay a bulad malpapacaw satu nadikudan sakunida sa tu, i sakatusa aca malpacawpacaw i kitakit tu saayayway alaen aca nu Su-lian . 1991 a mihcaan, Ay-sa-ni-ya sisa kinacacay aca malukunida. śĄõś≤ôŚįľšļěÁöĄÁŹĺšĽ£ŚúčŚźć(Eesti) esti.Śú®ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉ98ŚĻī, "aestii" "Eesti" . nu ayda a ngangan nu Ay-sa-ni-ya a kanatal (Eesti) u tatangahan namakayni i Ku-si-kan-ti-na-wei-ya a tademaw, ya i tidaay mueneng i Tung-si-kan-ti-na-wei-ya a binacadan amin u esti han nu heni. i kun-yun 98 a mihcaan, Ta-si-tuo i nipisulit nida "Ri-er-man-ni-ya-zhi " sakamu sa tya cacay u caay kalecad a kamu "aestii" patinaku tu tya Ay-sa-ni-ya . Ay-sa-ni-ya a tademaw u udip tu ku micukaymasay tu "Eesti" palungangan han tu kina kanatal, kina ngangan kiayyawan hen i 19 se-ci . nipicudad Ay-sa-ni-ya u nipicudad nu heni makilim tu i 13 atu 14 a se-ci , u nipatideng sayaway a siw-taw-yun atu nu kiwkay a cacudadan. u saayaway a cudad nu kamu Ay-sa-ni-ya sapasubana' a cudad napatahkal i 1575 a mihcaan. u nu kasumamadan a dayhak sa i Ta-er-tu a dayhaku, u Ri-tiyan a hungti ci Ku-si-ta-hu-er-se A-taw-hu i 1632 a mihcaan a nipatiden. i 1919 a mihcaan, u Ay-sa-ni-ya a kamu sayaway i tayhaku pasubana tu sapicudad. 589śČÄŚ≠łś†°. ayda u picudad nu Ay-sa-ni-ya u sakantanay, u kanamuhan a kawaw atu milinziay . ya sapasubana' tu nipicudad palasepaden: u talaayaway a nipasubana', sakatanitik a picudad, tu nu tanengay a picudad atu talakaway a nipicudad. misaahebal a patideng tu cacudatan nu wang-lu atu nisanga' tu sapasubana' a kawaw. u Ay-sa-ni-ya a sapasubana' sikaidaw ku kul-li , se-li , kung-li , atu se-li pakumuday a kawaw. nu aydaya a Ay-sa-ni-ya idaw tu ku lima a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa nu cacudadan. Cung-huw-min-kul atu Ay-sa-ni-ya u Cung-huw-min-kul atu Ay-sa-ni-ya u nu Cung-huw-min-kul atu Ay-sa-ni-ya masakaputay kapulungan a kanatal nu masacabaay a kanatal. kinatusaay a kanatal i 1937-1940 a mihca idaw ku talakaway nu mikawaway i hekal, sikasan u Su-liyen mialaw tu Ay-sa-ni-ya kyu mapulu. namakayni i 1991 a mihca makay i Su-liyen mahcacay hawsa, ayda nai' tu ku i tusu mapapadeng tu ta-si-kuwan-sin-ci u midayliay a pikawawan. sakay i Ay-sa-ni-ya sakaykawaw u Latvia i Taypak u midayliay nipadengan tu pikawawan. cen-ci masacabay a kapud 1937 a mihca sabaw tusa a bulad tusaay idaw kucacay a demiad, Ay-sa-ni-ya atu Cung-huw-min-kul patideng tu pikawawan nu masacabayay a kapud. 1940ŚĻī8śúą6śó•, . 1940 a mihca waluay a bulad idaw ku enenmay a demiad zayhan u Su-lian midebung tu Ay-sa-ni-ya a mapulu'. 1991ŚĻī11śúą8śó•, . 1991 a mihca sabaw cacay a bulad waluay ku demiad, Cung-huw-min-kul u mikawaway tu sakatusa a sakakaay ci Cang-Siyaw-Yan tayni mididaw a mipalita tu Ay-sa-ni-ya , atu ya pakasikalisiway a nikalcabay nu sakakaay ci Pi-Er-Fu masasulit tu sakay tini malaliyung tu sakasikalisiw a midayhiway sulit tu kalisiw tu mapapadan sakacaay kapawan. 1995ŚĻī6śúą, . 1995 a mihca enemay a bulad, u Cung-huw-min-kul u mababaliay a pu-cang mikelid tu masakaputay tayda i Rye-se milabu tu Mun-tay-na-lun-tan , nikahida masuadih tu Ay-sa-ni-ya a cung-tung ci Mei-Li , sikahini kina mahtusaay u malaliyun tu tuud hina papaliw. waluay a bulad, Ay-sa-ni-ya sayaway a cung-tung ci La-Er u mitayliay tu kanatal a mipalitay a kiing tayni i Taywan mididaw. sacumud a cudad O-cul Se-ken kenis pabeli tu sisulitay nu idaw tu a mibungsiway tu Cung-huw-min-kul a hu-caw nu Cung-huw-min-kul -kun-min taneng i Se-ken kenis caay pacudad tu sacumud a tayni, pahanhan tu demiad atu Se-ken kenis palamel a misausi, payenem a bulad nu demiadan hamin nu sausi tanen pahanhan tu siwaay a bataan nu demiad. manamec kina tusaay a kanatal panutek makakutay tu kawaw nu tusu "Tay-ay masasuayay masakamukamu tu sakay idaw ku kalisiw", katukuh i 2017 a mihca kina lima tu mikawaw. nisakalisiw a kawaw 2015 a mihca sepaday a bulad sabaw walu a demiad, cin-ci-pu kul-ci-maw-yi papipadan tu Cung-huw-min-kul tu hekalay a maw-yi-fa-can-siy-huy "way-maw-siy-huy " mikawaway tu "2015 a mihca u sin-Pei-O u micuduhat a milacuk tu kawaw sa "atu tulu a bataan idaw ku enem nu pikawawan tayda i Er-lul-si-sen-pi-te-paw , Hung-lan , Ay-sa-ni-ya , Ri-tiyan atu Po-lan kina kanatalan milihida tu sapatiyan, kina mapulungay kanca u Taywanay tu ku nanu tayda i Pai-o a kenis u satabakiay a misaahebal tu dadanan nu sapacakaymaba. 2017ŚĻī11śúą, . 2017 a mihca sabaw cacay a bulad, kung-ye-ci-su u tatangahan nu mikinkiway ci Li-Si-Kuwan mikelid tu manamecay i "2017 a mihca u O-cul idaw ku nisabaluhay nikinkiwan a patahekal papiadih tu tayniay atu mikilim tu mamilabu tina kawawan" tayda i Ay-sa-ni-ya millihida tu sapacakay. 2019ŚĻī, . 2019 a mihca, Ay-sa-ni-ya nu Cung-huw-min-kul sakay walu a bataan idaw ku siwa tabakiay nu malkumud a mababalin, u sakay cacay a lasubu idaw ku cacay u satabakiay nu micumutay a nikalcabay tu tuud, u sakay 74 u tabakiay a patahekal nu nikalcabay. ya tuud nipatahkal katukuh i Ay-sa-ni-yaay a kalisiw idaw ku 8,249 a mang 4,399 nu kalisiw, paymihcaan maselep tu 29,366 a pasintu. mababalin malakuwid tu "nisakalisiwan" 6,836 a mang 9,159 kalisiw nu paymihcaan maselep tu 16,199 pasintu; 2018 a mihca u Ay-sa-ni-ya u Cung-huw-min-kul saka walu a bataan idaw ku enem tabakiay amababaliay a nikacabayan, sakacacay a lasubu u tabakiay a pacumud tu tuud a masacabaay, u saka pitu idaw ku satabakiay a patahkal tu tuud nu malcabayay.
S.PHON: …ôstonia u …ôstonia sa i r~…ĺabu nu o ¶o, itiza i ** ** n, ** ** …ô. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mapur~…ĺuŇč sa izaw ku **,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj sa izaw ku **,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa izaw ku *,*** km*, ńßamin nu tad…ômawan sa *,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **.**% aj-sa-ni-ja a masakaputaj kapur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ (aj-sa-ni-ja a kamu: …ô…ôsti *abariik), ńßamin nu pur~…ĺuŇč aj-sa-ni-ja (aj-sa-ni-ja a kamu: …ô…ôsti, ( Ē~ °…ô*s*ti)), u saka ¶a ¶aj nu pu-r~…ĺur~…ĺ a baju nu kanatar~…ĺ, u satabakiaj a tusu nu ¶…ôn-s…ô i ta-r~…ĺin . aj-sa-ni-ja i o- ¶ur~…ĺ nu sawar~…ĺi saamisan. kini r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu kanatar~…ĺ namakajda i ta-r~…ĺu atu i t…ôban nu pu-r~…ĺur~…ĺ a baju **** a subar~…ĺ nu masakaput mapur~…ĺuŇč, pajsatip nu pu-r~…ĺur~…ĺ a baju, saamisan u ńßuŇč-r~…ĺan , i sawar~…ĺi mit…ôpar~…ĺ tu ¶u-t…ô-ńßu , nu timur~…ĺan atu sawar~…ĺian mar~…ĺiwasak mańßida u r~…ĺa-tur~…ĺ-w…ôi-ja atu …ôr-r~…ĺur~…ĺ-si u misur~…ĺur~…ĺaj pab…ôr~…ĺi, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° **,*** pin-ńßaw-kuŇč-r~…ĺi , u d…ômiad nu ta-r~…ĺu tan…ôŇčaj ku akuti Ē~ ° susu…ôm…ôdan . kina kanatar~…ĺ nu itiniaj tu a tad…ômaw u bina ¶adan aj-sa-ni-ja u nu pu-r~…ĺur~…ĺ u ńßuŇč-r~…ĺanaj a tad…ômaw. kina kanatar~…ĺ ajda satu nu pai-o-r~…ĺi-s…ô-ńßuj , o- ¶ur~…ĺ mar~…ĺ ¶abajaj mapur~…ĺuŇč, o-juan k…ônis , s…ôn-k…ôn k…ônis , saamisan ta-si-jaŇč nikapur~…ĺuŇčan a kaput , atu nu kar~…ĺisiw mar~…ĺpadan atu sapar~…ĺańß…ôd a masakapud a tad…ômaw nu kanatar~…ĺ, ja nisakar~…ĺis u sajadańßaj ku kar~…ĺisiw i kitaki. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: :…ô…ôsti *abariik), :…ô…ôsti,( Ē~ °…ô*s*ti) ), .) tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u tar~…ĺr~…ĺinn . kakininan nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad kakiniŇč nu tad…ômaw ńßawsa nu ńßuŇč-r~…ĺan-u-k…ô-…ôr a tad…ômaw . na i **** a mińß ¶aan, aj-sa-ni-ja ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺu nu tan-maj atu nu ri-…ôr-man a tad…ômawajaj nu r~…ĺi-wu-ni-ja u mipadaŇčaj miadin tu tad…ômaw pu-r~…ĺan-r~…ĺi-taw-wan mar~…ĺkaputaj . ** . ** a s…ô- ¶i maar~…ĺaw nu …ôr-r~…ĺur~…ĺ-si-sa nu ńßuŇčtiaj a kanatar~…ĺ u …ôr-kur~…ĺ ¶a ¶ajaj a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺpapa ¶aw satu nadikudan sakunida sa tu, i sakatusa a ¶a mar~…ĺpa ¶awpa ¶aw i kitakit tu saajajwaj ar~…ĺa…ôn a ¶a nu su-r~…ĺian . **** a mińß ¶aan, aj-sa-ni-ja sisa kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a mar~…ĺukunida. *********(…ô…ôsti) …ôsti.******, "a…ôstii" "…ô…ôsti" . nu ajda a ŇčaŇčan nu aj-sa-ni-ja a kanatar~…ĺ (…ô…ôsti) u tataŇčańßan namakajni i ku-si-kan-ti-na-w…ôi-ja a tad…ômaw, ja i tidaaj mu…ôn…ôŇč i tuŇč-si-kan-ti-na-w…ôi-ja a bina ¶adan amin u …ôsti ńßan nu ńß…ôni. i kun-jun ** a mińß ¶aan, ta-si-tuo i nipisur~…ĺit nida "*i-…ôr-man-ni-ja-zńßi " sakamu sa tja ¶a ¶aj u ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a kamu "a…ôstii" patinaku tu tja aj-sa-ni-ja . aj-sa-ni-ja a tad…ômaw u udip tu ku mi ¶ukajmasaj tu "…ô…ôsti" par~…ĺuŇčaŇčan ńßan tu kina kanatar~…ĺ, kina ŇčaŇčan kiajjawan ńß…ôn i ** s…ô- ¶i . nipi ¶udad aj-sa-ni-ja u nipi ¶udad nu ńß…ôni makir~…ĺim tu i ** atu ** a s…ô- ¶i , u nipatid…ôŇč sajawaj a siw-taw-jun atu nu kiwkaj a ¶a ¶udadan. u saajawaj a ¶udad nu kamu aj-sa-ni-ja sapasubana Ē~ ° a ¶udad napatańßkar~…ĺ i **** a mińß ¶aan. u nu kasumamadan a dajńßak sa i ta-…ôr-tu a dajńßaku, u *i-tijan a ńßuŇčti ¶i ku-si-ta-ńßu-…ôr-s…ô a-taw-ńßu i **** a mińß ¶aan a nipatid…ôn. i **** a mińß ¶aan, u aj-sa-ni-ja a kamu sajawaj i tajńßaku pasubana tu sapi ¶udad. ******. ajda u pi ¶udad nu aj-sa-ni-ja u sakantanaj, u kanamuńßan a kawaw atu mir~…ĺinziaj . ja sapasubana Ē~ ° tu nipi ¶udad par~…ĺas…ôpad…ôn: u tar~…ĺaajawaj a nipasubana Ē~ °, sakatanitik a pi ¶udad, tu nu tan…ôŇčaj a pi ¶udad atu tar~…ĺakawaj a nipi ¶udad. misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ a patid…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶udatan nu waŇč-r~…ĺu atu nisaŇča Ē~ ° tu sapasubana Ē~ ° a kawaw. u aj-sa-ni-ja a sapasubana Ē~ ° sikaidaw ku kur~…ĺ-r~…ĺi , s…ô-r~…ĺi , kuŇč-r~…ĺi , atu s…ô-r~…ĺi pakumudaj a kawaw. nu ajdaja a aj-sa-ni-ja idaw tu ku r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku siwa nu ¶a ¶udadan. ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ atu aj-sa-ni-ja u ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ atu aj-sa-ni-ja u nu ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ atu aj-sa-ni-ja masakaputaj kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ nu masa ¶abaaj a kanatar~…ĺ. kinatusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ i ****-**** a mińß ¶a idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj nu mikawawaj i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, sikasan u su-r~…ĺij…ôn miar~…ĺaw tu aj-sa-ni-ja kju mapur~…ĺu. namakajni i **** a mińß ¶a makaj i su-r~…ĺij…ôn mańß ¶a ¶aj ńßawsa, ajda nai Ē~ ° tu ku i tusu mapapad…ôŇč tu ta-si-kuwan-sin- ¶i u midajr~…ĺiaj a pikawawan. sakaj i aj-sa-ni-ja sakajkawaw u r~…ĺat*ia i tajpak u midajr~…ĺiaj nipad…ôŇčan tu pikawawan. ¶…ôn- ¶i masa ¶abaj a kapud **** a mińß ¶a sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad tusaaj idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, aj-sa-ni-ja atu ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ patid…ôŇč tu pikawawan nu masa ¶abajaj a kapud. *********, . **** a mińß ¶a war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad idaw ku …ôn…ônmaj a d…ômiad zajńßan u su-r~…ĺian mid…ôbuŇč tu aj-sa-ni-ja a mapur~…ĺu Ē~ °. **********, . **** a mińß ¶a sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad war~…ĺuaj ku d…ômiad, ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ u mikawawaj tu sakatusa a sakakaaj ¶i ¶aŇč-sijaw-jan tajni mididaw a mipar~…ĺita tu aj-sa-ni-ja , atu ja pakasikar~…ĺisiwaj a nikar~…ĺ ¶abaj nu sakakaaj ¶i pi-…ôr-fu masasur~…ĺit tu sakaj tini mar~…ĺar~…ĺijuŇč tu sakasikar~…ĺisiw a midajńßiwaj sur~…ĺit tu kar~…ĺisiw tu mapapadan saka ¶aaj kapawan. *******, . **** a mińß ¶a …ôn…ômaj a bur~…ĺad, u ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ u mababar~…ĺiaj a pu- ¶aŇč mik…ôr~…ĺid tu masakaputaj tajda i *j…ô-s…ô mir~…ĺabu tu mun-taj-na-r~…ĺun-tan , nikańßida masuadińß tu aj-sa-ni-ja a ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i m…ôi-r~…ĺi , sikańßini kina mańßtusaaj u mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu tuud ńßina papar~…ĺiw. war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad, aj-sa-ni-ja sajawaj a ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i r~…ĺa-…ôr u mitajr~…ĺiaj tu kanatar~…ĺ a mipar~…ĺitaj a kiiŇč tajni i tajwan mididaw. sa ¶umud a ¶udad o- ¶ur~…ĺ s…ô-k…ôn k…ônis pab…ôr~…ĺi tu sisur~…ĺitaj nu idaw tu a mibuŇčsiwaj tu ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ a ńßu- ¶aw nu ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ -kun-min tan…ôŇč i s…ô-k…ôn k…ônis ¶aaj pa ¶udad tu sa ¶umud a tajni, pańßanńßan tu d…ômiad atu s…ô-k…ôn k…ônis par~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ a misausi, paj…ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad nu d…ômiadan ńßamin nu sausi tan…ôn pańßanńßan tu siwaaj a bataan nu d…ômiad. manam…ô ¶ kina tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ panut…ôk makakutaj tu kawaw nu tusu "taj-aj masasuajaj masakamukamu tu sakaj idaw ku kar~…ĺisiw", katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶a kina r~…ĺima tu mikawaw. nisakar~…ĺisiw a kawaw **** a mińß ¶a s…ôpadaj a bur~…ĺad sabaw war~…ĺu a d…ômiad, ¶in- ¶i-pu kur~…ĺ- ¶i-maw-ji papipadan tu ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a maw-ji-fa- ¶an-sij-ńßuj "waj-maw-sij-ńßuj " mikawawaj tu "**** a mińß ¶a u sin-p…ôi-o u mi ¶uduńßat a mir~…ĺa ¶uk tu kawaw sa "atu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm nu pikawawan tajda i …ôr-r~…ĺur~…ĺ-si-s…ôn-pi-t…ô-paw , ńßuŇč-r~…ĺan , aj-sa-ni-ja , *i-tijan atu po-r~…ĺan kina kanatar~…ĺan mir~…ĺińßida tu sapatijan, kina mapur~…ĺuŇčaj kan ¶a u tajwanaj tu ku nanu tajda i pai-o a k…ônis u satabakiaj a misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu dadanan nu sapa ¶akajmaba. ********, . **** a mińß ¶a sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad, kuŇč-j…ô- ¶i-su u tataŇčańßan nu mikinkiwaj ¶i r~…ĺi-si-kuwan mik…ôr~…ĺid tu manam…ô ¶aj i "**** a mińß ¶a u o- ¶ur~…ĺ idaw ku nisabar~…ĺuńßaj nikinkiwan a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ papiadińß tu tajniaj atu mikir~…ĺim tu mamir~…ĺabu tina kawawan" tajda i aj-sa-ni-ja mir~…ĺr~…ĺińßida tu sapa ¶akaj. *****, . **** a mińß ¶a, aj-sa-ni-ja nu ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ sakaj war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku siwa tabakiaj nu mar~…ĺkumud a mababar~…ĺin, u sakaj ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku ¶a ¶aj u satabakiaj nu mi ¶umutaj a nikar~…ĺ ¶abaj tu tuud, u sakaj ** u tabakiaj a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu nikar~…ĺ ¶abaj. ja tuud nipatańßkar~…ĺ katukuńß i aj-sa-ni-jaaj a kar~…ĺisiw idaw ku *,*** a maŇč *,*** nu kar~…ĺisiw, pajmińß ¶aan mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu **,*** a pasintu. mababar~…ĺin mar~…ĺakuwid tu "nisakar~…ĺisiwan" *,*** a maŇč *,*** kar~…ĺisiw nu pajmińß ¶aan mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu **,*** pasintu; **** a mińß ¶a u aj-sa-ni-ja u ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ saka war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm tabakiaj amababar~…ĺiaj a nika ¶abajan, saka ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu u tabakiaj a pa ¶umud tu tuud a masa ¶abaaj, u saka pitu idaw ku satabakiaj a patańßkar~…ĺ tu tuud nu mar~…ĺ ¶abajaj.
S.FORM: Estonia u Estonia sa i labu nu Oco, itiza i 59 00 N, 26 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 45,228 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 42,388 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 2,840 km2, hamin nu tademawan sa 1,258,545. kakalukan umah sa 22.20%, kilakilangan umah sa 52.10%, zumaay henay umah sa 25.70% Ay-sa-ni-ya a masakaputay kapulung a kanatal (Ay-sa-ni-ya a kamu: Eesti Vabariik), hamin nu pulung Ay-sa-ni-ya (Ay-sa-ni-ya a kamu: Eesti, ('eňźs ≤ti)), u sakacacay nu Pu-lul a bayu nu kanatal, u satabakiay a tusu nu cen-se i Ta-lin . Ay-sa-ni-ya i O-cul nu sawali saamisan. kini lala' nu kanatal namakayda i ta-lu atu i teban nu Pu-lul a bayu 2222 a subal nu masakaput mapulung, paysatip nu Pu-lul a bayu, saamisan u Hung-lan , i sawali mitepal tu Cu-te-hu , nu timulan atu sawalian maliwasak mahida u La-tul-wei-ya atu Er-lul-si u misululay pabeli, u ahebal nu lala' 45,227 pin-haw-kung-li , u demiad nu ta-lu tanengay ku akuti' susuemedan . kina kanatal nu itiniay tu a tademaw u binacadan Ay-sa-ni-ya u nu Pu-lul u Hung-lanay a tademaw. kina kanatal ayda satu nu Pai-o-li-se-huy , O-cul malcabayay mapulung, O-yuan kenis , Sen-ken kenis , saamisan ta-si-yang nikapulungan a kaput , atu nu kalisiw malpadan atu sapalahed a masakapud a tademaw nu kanatal, ya nisakalis u sayadahay ku kalisiw i kitaki. (u kamu nu Hulam: :Eesti Vabariik), :Eesti,('eňźs ≤ti) ), .) tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Tallinn . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 24 bulad 2 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung ÁłĹÁĶĪ) ayza sa ci Alar Karis, micakat a demiad sa i 2016 a mihca 11 bulad 10 demiad. u cunli nu Estonia ayza sa ci Kaja Kallas, micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 1 bulad 26 demiad. laylay Ay-sa-ni-ya a kakitidaan i ayaw nu laylay a tademaw hawsa nu Hung-lan-u-ke-er a tademaw . na i 1227 a mihcaan, Ay-sa-ni-ya alaw malu nu Tan-may atu nu ri-er-man a tademawayay nu Li-wu-ni-ya u mipadangay miadin tu tademaw temeceng, namahini sisa cumuden nu ciwlu . namakayni satu sa, Ay-sa-ni-ya kina pinaay tu makuwan nu Bei-o . nikahida idaw ku Tan-may , Nul-wiy , Rye-tiyan a kanatal, Pu-lan-li-taw-wan malkaputay . 18 . 18 a se-ci maalaw nu Er-lul-si-sa nu hungtiay a kanatal u Er-kul cacayay a bulad malpapacaw satu nadikudan sakunida sa tu, i sakatusa aca malpacawpacaw i kitakit tu saayayway alaen aca nu Su-lian . 1991 a mihcaan, Ay-sa-ni-ya sisa kinacacay aca malukunida. śĄõś≤ôŚįľšļěÁöĄÁŹĺšĽ£ŚúčŚźć(Eesti) esti.Śú®ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉ98ŚĻī, "aestii" "Eesti" . nu ayda a ngangan nu Ay-sa-ni-ya a kanatal (Eesti) u tatangahan namakayni i Ku-si-kan-ti-na-wei-ya a tademaw, ya i tidaay mueneng i Tung-si-kan-ti-na-wei-ya a binacadan amin u esti han nu heni. i kun-yun 98 a mihcaan, Ta-si-tuo i nipisulit nida "Ri-er-man-ni-ya-zhi " sakamu sa tya cacay u caay kalecad a kamu "aestii" patinaku tu tya Ay-sa-ni-ya . Ay-sa-ni-ya a tademaw u udip tu ku micukaymasay tu "Eesti" palungangan han tu kina kanatal, kina ngangan kiayyawan hen i 19 se-ci . nipicudad Ay-sa-ni-ya u nipicudad nu heni makilim tu i 13 atu 14 a se-ci , u nipatideng sayaway a siw-taw-yun atu nu kiwkay a cacudadan. u saayaway a cudad nu kamu Ay-sa-ni-ya sapasubana' a cudad napatahkal i 1575 a mihcaan. u nu kasumamadan a dayhak sa i Ta-er-tu a dayhaku, u Ri-tiyan a hungti ci Ku-si-ta-hu-er-se A-taw-hu i 1632 a mihcaan a nipatiden. i 1919 a mihcaan, u Ay-sa-ni-ya a kamu sayaway i tayhaku pasubana tu sapicudad. 589śČÄŚ≠łś†°. ayda u picudad nu Ay-sa-ni-ya u sakantanay, u kanamuhan a kawaw atu milinziay . ya sapasubana' tu nipicudad palasepaden: u talaayaway a nipasubana', sakatanitik a picudad, tu nu tanengay a picudad atu talakaway a nipicudad. misaahebal a patideng tu cacudatan nu wang-lu atu nisanga' tu sapasubana' a kawaw. u Ay-sa-ni-ya a sapasubana' sikaidaw ku kul-li , se-li , kung-li , atu se-li pakumuday a kawaw. nu aydaya a Ay-sa-ni-ya idaw tu ku lima a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa nu cacudadan. Cung-huw-min-kul atu Ay-sa-ni-ya u Cung-huw-min-kul atu Ay-sa-ni-ya u nu Cung-huw-min-kul atu Ay-sa-ni-ya masakaputay kapulungan a kanatal nu masacabaay a kanatal. kinatusaay a kanatal i 1937-1940 a mihca idaw ku talakaway nu mikawaway i hekal, sikasan u Su-liyen mialaw tu Ay-sa-ni-ya kyu mapulu. namakayni i 1991 a mihca makay i Su-liyen mahcacay hawsa, ayda nai' tu ku i tusu mapapadeng tu ta-si-kuwan-sin-ci u midayliay a pikawawan. sakay i Ay-sa-ni-ya sakaykawaw u Latvia i Taypak u midayliay nipadengan tu pikawawan. cen-ci masacabay a kapud 1937 a mihca sabaw tusa a bulad tusaay idaw kucacay a demiad, Ay-sa-ni-ya atu Cung-huw-min-kul patideng tu pikawawan nu masacabayay a kapud. 1940ŚĻī8śúą6śó•, . 1940 a mihca waluay a bulad idaw ku enenmay a demiad zayhan u Su-lian midebung tu Ay-sa-ni-ya a mapulu'. 1991ŚĻī11śúą8śó•, . 1991 a mihca sabaw cacay a bulad waluay ku demiad, Cung-huw-min-kul u mikawaway tu sakatusa a sakakaay ci Cang-Siyaw-Yan tayni mididaw a mipalita tu Ay-sa-ni-ya , atu ya pakasikalisiway a nikalcabay nu sakakaay ci Pi-Er-Fu masasulit tu sakay tini malaliyung tu sakasikalisiw a midayhiway sulit tu kalisiw tu mapapadan sakacaay kapawan. 1995ŚĻī6śúą, . 1995 a mihca enemay a bulad, u Cung-huw-min-kul u mababaliay a pu-cang mikelid tu masakaputay tayda i Rye-se milabu tu Mun-tay-na-lun-tan , nikahida masuadih tu Ay-sa-ni-ya a cung-tung ci Mei-Li , sikahini kina mahtusaay u malaliyun tu tuud hina papaliw. waluay a bulad, Ay-sa-ni-ya sayaway a cung-tung ci La-Er u mitayliay tu kanatal a mipalitay a kiing tayni i Taywan mididaw. sacumud a cudad O-cul Se-ken kenis pabeli tu sisulitay nu idaw tu a mibungsiway tu Cung-huw-min-kul a hu-caw nu Cung-huw-min-kul -kun-min taneng i Se-ken kenis caay pacudad tu sacumud a tayni, pahanhan tu demiad atu Se-ken kenis palamel a misausi, payenem a bulad nu demiadan hamin nu sausi tanen pahanhan tu siwaay a bataan nu demiad. manamec kina tusaay a kanatal panutek makakutay tu kawaw nu tusu "Tay-ay masasuayay masakamukamu tu sakay idaw ku kalisiw", katukuh i 2017 a mihca kina lima tu mikawaw. nisakalisiw a kawaw 2015 a mihca sepaday a bulad sabaw walu a demiad, cin-ci-pu kul-ci-maw-yi papipadan tu Cung-huw-min-kul tu hekalay a maw-yi-fa-can-siy-huy "way-maw-siy-huy " mikawaway tu "2015 a mihca u sin-Pei-O u micuduhat a milacuk tu kawaw sa "atu tulu a bataan idaw ku enem nu pikawawan tayda i Er-lul-si-sen-pi-te-paw , Hung-lan , Ay-sa-ni-ya , Ri-tiyan atu Po-lan kina kanatalan milihida tu sapatiyan, kina mapulungay kanca u Taywanay tu ku nanu tayda i Pai-o a kenis u satabakiay a misaahebal tu dadanan nu sapacakaymaba. 2017ŚĻī11śúą, . 2017 a mihca sabaw cacay a bulad, kung-ye-ci-su u tatangahan nu mikinkiway ci Li-Si-Kuwan mikelid tu manamecay i "2017 a mihca u O-cul idaw ku nisabaluhay nikinkiwan a patahekal papiadih tu tayniay atu mikilim tu mamilabu tina kawawan" tayda i Ay-sa-ni-ya millihida tu sapacakay. 2019ŚĻī, . 2019 a mihca, Ay-sa-ni-ya nu Cung-huw-min-kul sakay walu a bataan idaw ku siwa tabakiay nu malkumud a mababalin, u sakay cacay a lasubu idaw ku cacay u satabakiay nu micumutay a nikalcabay tu tuud, u sakay 74 u tabakiay a patahekal nu nikalcabay. ya tuud nipatahkal katukuh i Ay-sa-ni-yaay a kalisiw idaw ku 8,249 a mang 4,399 nu kalisiw, paymihcaan maselep tu 29,366 a pasintu. mababalin malakuwid tu "nisakalisiwan" 6,836 a mang 9,159 kalisiw nu paymihcaan maselep tu 16,199 pasintu; 2018 a mihca u Ay-sa-ni-ya u Cung-huw-min-kul saka walu a bataan idaw ku enem tabakiay amababaliay a nikacabayan, sakacacay a lasubu u tabakiay a pacumud tu tuud a masacabaay, u saka pitu idaw ku satabakiay a patahkal tu tuud nu malcabayay.

sakakaaj ¶i pi-…ôr-fu masasur~…ĺit tu sakaj tini mar~…ĺar~…ĺijuŇč tu sakasikar~…ĺisiw a midajńßiwaj sur~…ĺit tu kar~…ĺisiw tu mapapadan saka ¶aaj kapawan. *******, . **** a mińß ¶a …ôn…ômaj a bur~…ĺad, u ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ u mababar~…ĺiaj a pu- ¶aŇč mik…ôr~…ĺid tu masakaputaj tajda i *j…ô-s…ô mir~…ĺabu tu mun-taj-na-r~…ĺun-tan , nikańßida masuadińß tu aj-sa-ni-ja a ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i m…ôi-r~…ĺi , sikańßini kina mańßtusaaj u mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu tuud ńßina papar~…ĺiw. war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad, aj-sa-ni-ja sajawaj a ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i r~…ĺa-…ôr u mitajr~…ĺiaj tu kanatar~…ĺ a mipar~…ĺitaj a kiiŇč tajni i tajwan mididaw. sa ¶umud a ¶udad o- ¶ur~…ĺ s…ô-k…ôn k…ônis pab…ôr~…ĺi tu sisur~…ĺitaj nu idaw tu a mibuŇčsiwaj tu ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ a ńßu- ¶aw nu ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ -kun-min tan…ôŇč i s…ô-k…ôn k…ônis ¶aaj pa ¶udad tu sa ¶umud a tajni, pańßanńßan tu d…ômiad atu s…ô-k…ôn k…ônis par~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ a misausi, paj…ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad nu d…ômiadan ńßamin nu sausi tan…ôn pańßanńßan tu siwaaj a bataan nu d…ômiad. manam…ô ¶ kina tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ panut…ôk makakutaj tu kawaw nu tusu "taj-aj masasuajaj masakamukamu tu sakaj idaw ku kar~…ĺisiw", katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶a kina r~…ĺima tu mikawaw. nisakar~…ĺisiw a kawaw **** a mińß ¶a s…ôpadaj a bur~…ĺad sabaw war~…ĺu a d…ômiad, ¶in- ¶i-pu kur~…ĺ- ¶i-maw-ji papipadan tu ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a maw-ji-fa- ¶an-sij-ńßuj "waj-maw-sij-ńßuj " mikawawaj tu "**** a mińß ¶a u sin-p…ôi-o u mi ¶uduńßat a mir~…ĺa ¶uk tu kawaw sa "atu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm nu pikawawan tajda i …ôr-r~…ĺur~…ĺ-si-s…ôn-pi-t…ô-paw , ńßuŇč-r~…ĺan , aj-sa-ni-ja , *i-tijan atu po-r~…ĺan kina kanatar~…ĺan mir~…ĺińßida tu sapatijan, kina mapur~…ĺuŇčaj kan ¶a u tajwanaj tu ku nanu tajda i pai-o a k…ônis u satabakiaj a misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu dadanan nu sapa ¶akajmaba. ********, . **** a mińß ¶a sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad, kuŇč-j…ô- ¶i-su u tataŇčańßan nu mikinkiwaj ¶i r~…ĺi-si-kuwan mik…ôr~…ĺid tu manam…ô ¶aj i "**** a mińß ¶a u o- ¶ur~…ĺ idaw ku nisabar~…ĺuńßaj nikinkiwan a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ papiadińß tu tajniaj atu mikir~…ĺim tu mamir~…ĺabu tina kawawan" tajda i aj-sa-ni-ja mir~…ĺr~…ĺińßida tu sapa ¶akaj. *****, . **** a mińß ¶a, aj-sa-ni-ja nu ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ sakaj war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku siwa tabakiaj nu mar~…ĺkumud a mababar~…ĺin, u sakaj ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku ¶a ¶aj u satabakiaj nu mi ¶umutaj a nikar~…ĺ ¶abaj tu tuud, u sakaj ** u tabakiaj a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu nikar~…ĺ ¶abaj. ja tuud nipatańßkar~…ĺ katukuńß i aj-sa-ni-jaaj a kar~…ĺisiw idaw ku *,*** a maŇč *,*** nu kar~…ĺisiw, pajmińß ¶aan mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu **,*** a pasintu. mababar~…ĺin mar~…ĺakuwid tu "nisakar~…ĺisiwan" *,*** a maŇč *,*** kar~…ĺisiw nu pajmińß ¶aan mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu **,*** pasintu; **** a mińß ¶a u aj-sa-ni-ja u ¶uŇč-ńßuw-min-kur~…ĺ saka war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm tabakiaj amababar~…ĺiaj a nika ¶abajan, saka ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu u tabakiaj a pa ¶umud tu tuud a masa ¶abaaj, u saka pitu idaw ku satabakiaj a patańßkar~…ĺ tu tuud nu mar~…ĺ ¶abajaj.
